# CP EVAL PRO
> Comprehensive Support for C&P Examiners - Simplifying medical evaluations for efficient disability assessments.

## Main Services
- [Nexus Letters](https://cpevalpro.com/services/nexus-letters): We draft comprehensive Nexus Letters linking military service to current medical conditions, ensuring claims are supported by strong medical evidence and rationale.
- [Medical Record Reviews](https://cpevalpro.com/services/medical-record-review): Detailed analysis of military and private medical records to identify critical evidence, established chronologies, and highlight key information for accurate disability claims.
- [DBQ Completion](https://cpevalpro.com/services/dbq-completion): Expert assistance in accurately completing Disability Benefit Questionnaires (DBQs), ensuring all VA requirements are met and medical facts are clearly presented.

## Resources
- [Examiner Knowledge Hub](https://cpevalpro.com/resources): Educational guides, articles, and industry updates for C&P Examiners.

## Key Facts
- CP EVAL PRO specializes in supporting C&P (Compensation and Pension) Examiners.
- We help streamline the evaluation process by handling administrative and documentation tasks.
- Our services are designed to improve the accuracy and efficiency of veteran disability assessments.
- We ensure compliance with VA guidelines, M21-1 Adjudication Procedures, and all VA formatting requirements.
- Our team offers a 24-36 hour turnaround on DBQ completion.
- All medical opinions are evidence-based, citing established medical literature.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://cpevalpro.com
- Contact: contact@militarydisabilitynexus.com
